creators.name: Liu, Dexing
creators.affiliation: Shanghai Qijing Digital Technology Co., Ltd.

title: Channel Fracture Registry
description: A public taxonomy of silent reliability failures (channel fractures) in autonomous agent systems. 100 classified cases across 7 AI agent frameworks (Hermes, LangGraph, CrewAI, LangChain, Semantic Kernel, AutoGen, Google ADK). Includes evidence model (observed→reported→reproduced→verified), severity scale (S1-S4), and machine-readable data.
